name: Anti-Bot
description: Comprehensive bot detection and prevention. Includes rate limiting, flood detection, bot heuristics, handshake validation, and dynamic blocking.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Account Protection
description: Staff account security with TOTP two-factor authentication, session IP locking, and enrollment management.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Identity Enforcement
description: VPN, proxy, and suspicious IP detection using proxycheck.io. Blocks anonymized connections with subnet-level caching.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Geo-Filtering
description: Country-based access control using geojs.io geolocation. Supports blacklist and whitelist modes with connection statistics.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Profiler
description: Deep JVM profiling for Paper servers — thread sampling with flame graph output, TPS/MSPT, per-plugin CPU attribution, memory & GC analysis. Automatically deploys profiling extender modules.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Server Monitor
description: Tracks backend server health and performance telemetry from extenders.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Spike Detector
description: Detects expensive chunks from Paper profiling reports and can auto-mitigate critical lag spikes.
author: ErikRadovan
